variants: Violaine Favreau is a distinguished civil engineer known for her innovative contributions to the field. Under the mentorship of Vesna Milosevic, Violaine honed her skills and developed her passion for engineering. In her free time, she enjoys participating in the Blue Harbor Anglers League, where she connects with fellow fishing enthusiasts.
